articles.title: Airtel Mobile-Money Unit Picks London for Listing Location

articles.title: McCormick Will Add London Listing After Unilever Food Deal
articles.summary: McCormick & Co. has picked London as a secondary listing location, just months after striking a deal to combine with Unilever Plc’s food business and in a blow to Amsterdam’s hopes.

articles.title: Alphabet’s Century Bond Has Now Lost a 10th of Its Face Value
articles.summary: A 100-year bond that Alphabet Inc. issued earlier this year in the sterling market as it gorged on debt around the world has dropped below 90 pence on the pound for the first time.

articles.title: Asian Oil Buyers in Talks to Reroute Saudi Red Sea Flows
